reason: Both answers reach the correct verdict, correctly note the audit trail need is satisfied by a plain append only ledger table, recommend CRUD plus ledger, suggest buying an existing billing provider first, and note the enthusiasm is for the pattern not the problem. B adds more billing domain color such as dunning and credit notes but is written in broken telegraphic English throughout, which hurts clarity. A conveys the same substance in clean well structured prose. Coverage of key points is roughly equivalent, so the tie breaker is clarity and polish, favoring A.
